summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Visual Overhaul #2 for Supplement Protocol Management app. All major visual changes and functionality working correctly with warm amber/orange colors, colorful buttons, and proper role-based access control.
passed_tests: Admin login flow working correctly (admin@clarity.com / admin123)
HC login flow working correctly (hc@clarity.com / hc123)
Dashboard stat cards display with warm tinted backgrounds (orange, amber, green)
Dashboard shows correct stat counts: Total Plans, Drafts, Finalized
Dashboard table loads with proper color-coded badges (orange for draft, green for finalized)
Plan Editor opens from dashboard plan clicks
Plan Editor patient name is properly centered
Plan Editor colorful action buttons working: Patient View (blue), Patient PDF (orange), HC PDF (black), Save (teal), Finalize (amber)
Plan Editor cost summary panel displays on right side with warm cream background
Plan Editor uses CSS grid layout with left-aligned columns
Cost calculations displaying correctly ($1061.16 program total shown)
HC users only see Dashboard and New Plan navigation (Supplements and Templates hidden)
HC users see filtered data (3 plans vs admin's 8 plans)
Visual overhaul #2 warm amber/orange accent colors implemented throughout
Button color scheme properly implemented: orange primary, black secondary, teal save, amber finalize
